data.fixedTermEnd: automatically ends on expiry date unless renewed
landlordValidReasons: cause (repeated late rent, illegal activity, substantial damage)
landlord use (moving in, close family member, selling with vacant possession)
notes: Landlords must use the correct RTB notice form for the reason.
Tenants can end a month-to-month tenancy by giving one full rental month's notice.
Some notices require dispute resolution if the tenant does not agree.

citations.statute: Residential Tenancy Act, SBC 2002, c 78, s 44
citations.excerpt: A tenancy ends on the expiry date of a fixed term tenancy agreement.

citations.statute: Residential Tenancy Act, SBC 2002, c 78, s 45
citations.excerpt: A tenant may end a month-to-month tenancy by giving the landlord at least one month's notice.

notes: Placeholder values for calculator use. Verify with RTB.
